data.title: transcosmos holds Roblox-based seminar in Wakayama to develop Future Creators. Supports GGX project in gaming festival.
data.description: transcosmos is backing Game Grove X (GGX), a game development initiative led by Wakayama Prefecture, assisting in nurturing next-generation customer experience talent. During the GGX Games Showcase, a local gaming festival, the project aims to refine young creators' skills. This program will help improve and verify their abilities, showcasing their potential to contribute to the industry. The event is scheduled for February 20, 2026, in Tokyo.

data.title: BTS Group AB (publ) releases year-end report for January to December 2025.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease in unemployment has resulted in approximately 300,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the past month, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts predict that this positive trend in the economy is likely to continue in the coming months.

data.title: FDA approves VENCLEXTA® and Acalabrutinib combo for CLL. First all-oral regimen for untreated patients. Significant advancement.
data.description: A new all-oral, fixed-duration combination regimen has been approved for patients with Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL) who have not previously been treated. The approval was based on results from the Phase 3 AMPLIFY trial. This regimen provides a potential option for patients to take time off treatment. This advancement in long-term disease management is significant for patients with CLL.

data.title: Kosmos Energy's Ghana licenses extended to 2040, bringing $2 billion investment and increased gas supply.
data.description: In Dallas, Kosmos Energy (NYSE/LSE: KOS) has officially announced that the license extensions for the West Cape Three Points and Deepwater Tano Petroleum Agreements, encompassing the Jubilee and TEN fields in Ghana, have been approved by the Ghanaian parliament. These extensions secure the licenses until 2040, projecting significant advantages for Ghana, such as attracting up to $2 billion in additional investments and ensuring increased supplies of cost-effective gas from the mentioned fields.
In 2025, EDF reports robust operational performance with positive cash flow, lowering net financial debt.

data.title: Investor call by Tetragon Financial Group Limited on March 6, 2026, to discuss annual report and company update.
data.description: In London on February 20, 2026, Tetragon has announced they will be conducting a conference call for investors on Friday, March 6, 2026, at 15:00 GMT / 10:00 EST. Their annual report will be discussed along with a company update. The investment manager from Tetragon will be addressing inquiries raised during the call.
